name: dna-management
description: Comprehensive test scenario for DNA management functionality including creation, modification, inheritance, and merging
author: MCP Test Framework
descriptionLong: This test scenario validates the complete DNA management system including DNA creation, modification, inheritance hierarchy (user > project > system), and merging functionality. It tests both the low-level DNA manager functions and the high-level inheritance system.
objectives: Verify DNA file creation with default and custom configurations
Test DNA loading and caching functionality
Validate DNA schema validation and error handling
Test DNA inheritance hierarchy (user overrides project, project overrides system)
Verify DNA merging with partial and complete overrides
Test explicit parameter override of inherited DNA
Validate backward compatibility with legacy DNA format
Test DNA cache invalidation and refresh

steps.name: Setup: Clean test environment
steps.check: Test directory is clean and ready for testing
steps.expected: No DNA files or temp files in test directory

steps.name: Test DNA creation with defaults
steps.check: DNA file created with default configuration
steps.expected: DNA file created with default values

steps.name: Test DNA creation with custom values
steps.check: DNA file created with custom configuration
steps.expected: DNA file created with custom company name and style preset

steps.name: Test DNA schema validation - valid DNA
Test DNA schema validation - invalid DNA
steps.expected: Invalid DNA fails validation with appropriate errors

steps.name: Test DNA inheritance - system defaults
steps.check: System defaults are applied when no DNA files exist
steps.expected: System defaults applied when no DNA files

steps.name: Test DNA inheritance - project DNA only
steps.check: Project DNA is applied when user DNA doesn't exist
steps.expected: Project DNA applied when user DNA missing

steps.name: Test DNA inheritance - user DNA override
steps.expected: User DNA properly overrides project DNA

steps.name: Test DNA merging - partial override
steps.check: Un-overridden values from project are preserved

steps.name: Test DNA merging - complete override
steps.check: All values properly merged with full override
steps.expected: Complete merge with full user override

steps.name: Test DNA cache functionality
steps.check: DNA cache returns same data for same file

steps.name: Test DNA cache invalidation
steps.check: DNA cache refreshes when file changes
steps.expected: DNA cache properly invalidates on file change

steps.name: Test DNA modification
steps.check: DNA can be modified after creation

steps.name: Test applyDNAToInput - header injection
steps.check: Header is injected when not provided
steps.expected: Header and footer injected into input

steps.name: Test applyDNAToInput - no override
steps.expected: Explicit parameters preserved, DNA defaults applied elsewhere
